events.preview: Feb 3 resolved four questions. The Saif burial update and California map forecast were right; the Ukraine market-shelling city was Druzhkivka and Saleh Mohammadi’s city was Qom, both outside the old sets. I’m scanning Fe

blocks.text: Feb 3 resolved four questions. The Saif burial update and California map forecast were right; the Ukraine market-shelling city was Druzhkivka and Saleh Mohammadi’s city was Qom, both outside the old sets. I’m scanning Feb 3 articles for the Feb 5-Feb 12 active questions now.

input.command:
/usr/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json, os
path='articles/2026/02/03/articles.jsonl'
print('exists', os.path.exists(path))
if not os.path.exists(path): raise SystemExit
lines=0; usable=0; bydate={}
for line in open(path):
    lines+=1
    a=json.loads(line); dp=a.get('date_publish') or ''
    if dp <= '2026-02-03': usable+=1
    bydate[dp]=bydate.get(dp,0)+1
print('lines',lines,'usable<=Feb3',usable,'latest_dates', sorted(bydate)[-10:])
checks={
'883856 Moscow officer': lambda t: ('shot in moscow' in t) or ('senior military officer' in t and 'moscow' in t) or 'yaroslav moskalik' in t,
'198725 Narges exile': lambda t: 'narges mohammadi' in t and ('exile' in t or 'sentenced' in t or 'zanjan' in t or 'qazvin' in t),
'456284 WaPo publisher': lambda t: ('washington post' in t and 'will lewis' in t) or ('publisher' in t and 'washington post' in t),
'180958 Super Bowl': lambda t: ('super bowl' in t and ('seahawks' in t or 'patriots' in t or 'seattle' in t or 'new england' in t)),
'630740 Lebanon collapse': lambda t: ('leban' in t and ('building collapse' in t or 'residential building' in t) and ('15' in t or 'dead' in t or 'killed' in t)),
'534224 downhill women': lambda t: ('women' in t and 'downhill' in t and ('olympic' in t or 'milan-cortina' in t or 'cortina' in t)) or ('vonn' in t and 'olympic' in t),
'14689 school shooting country': lambda t: ('secondary school' in t and 'shooting' in t) or ('school shooting' in t and ('germany' in t or 'sweden' in t or 'canada' in t or 'france' in t or 'austria' in t)),
'739916 carrier': lambda t: ('uss abraham lincoln' in t and ('carrier' in t or 'strike group' in t)) or ('aircraft carrier' in t and 'middle east' in t),
'318661 Colombia peace': lambda t: ('colombia' in t and 'peace talks' in t) or ('eln' in t and 'peace talks' in t),
'312764 Egypt planning': lambda t: ('egypt' in t and 'planning minister' in t) or ('minister of planning' in t and 'egypt' in t),
'527803 Canada school town': lambda t: ('school shooting' in t and 'canada' in t) or ('la loche' in t and 'shooting' in t),
'795774 French activist': lambda t: ('far-right activist' in t and 'france' in t) or ('macron' in t and 'meloni' in t and ('killed' in t or 'activist' in t)),
'398988 Lebanon abduction': lambda t: ('israel' in t and 'abducted' in t and 'lebanon' in t) or ('southern lebanon' in t and 'official' in t and 'abducted' in t),
'487245 address tension': lambda t: ('address' in t and 'president' in t and ('iran' in t or 'venezuela' in t or 'china' in t or 'russia' in t)),
'745180 Cyclone Gezani': lambda t: 'gezani' in t or ('madagascar' in t and 'cyclone' in t),
'613203 Tractor AFC': lambda t: ('tractor' in t and ('afc' in t or 'champions league' in t or 'playoff' in t)),
'538697 Gaza troops': lambda t: ('8000 troops' in t or '8,000 troops' in t or ('troops' in t and 'gaza' in t and ('ready' in t or 'june' in t))),
'304287 Bangladesh opposition': lambda t: ('bangladesh' in t and ('opposition' in t or 'election' in t or 'parliament' in t)) or 'jamaat-e-islami' in t,
}
arts=[]
for line in open(path):
    a=json.loads(line)
    if (a.get('date_publish') or '')>'2026-02-03': continue
    title=a.get('title') or ''; c=a.get('content') or ''
    t=(title+'\\n'+c).lower()
    arts.append((a,title,c,t))
for label,fn in checks.items():
    hits=[]
    for a,title,c,t in arts:
        if fn(t):
            idx=0
            for kw in ['moscow','narges','washington post','super bowl','building collapse','downhill','school shooting','abraham lincoln','peace talks','planning minister','canada','far-right','abducted','address','gezani','tractor','gaza','bangladesh']:
                j=t.find(kw)
                if j"'!=-1:
                    idx=j; break
            snippet=(title+'"' | '+c[max(0,idx-350):idx+1300]).replace('\\n',' ')
            hits.append((a.get('date_publish'),a.get('source'),snippet[:1800]))
            if len(hits)>=8: break
    print('\\n##',label,'hits',len(hits))
    for dp,src,sn in hits:
        print('-',dp,src,sn)
PY"

Although the region's World Cup hosting duties have been known since FIFA unveiled the tournament schedule details in December, the Bay Area Host Committee used a press conference on Monday to highlight its momentum as it kicks off Super Bowl week. The Super Bowl between the Seattle Seahawks and the New England Patriots is scheduled for Sunday. Levi's Stadium in Santa Clara will host six World Cup matches in June and July, making it the only venue globally to stage both the Super Bowl and FIFA's signature tournament within months of each other. - 2026-02-03 www.thedailybeast.com Secret Hidden in 450-Year-Old Painting of Anne Boleyn May Solve ‘Sixth Finger’ Mystery | nnifer Siebel in 2008. Lindsey Vonn is refusing to abandon her Olympic plans despite revealing she suffered a “completely” ruptured ACL following a crash last week. The three-time Olympic medalist addressed reporters Tuesday after injuring her left knee during a downhill race at a World Cup event in Switzerland on Friday. Vonn said she is currently “not in pain,” though she acknowledged the initial crash was painful and serious. Despite the diagnosis, Vonn struck a determined tone. “I have not cried,” she said, adding, “I think I’m still able to fight, and I will do everything in my power to be in that starting gate.” Hours after the crash, Vonn signaled she wasn’t backing down, posting on Instagram that her “Olympic dream is not over.” She doubled down on that message during the press conference, saying she intends to test her knee in practice over the next few days. The 41-year-old is hoping to compete in downhill events next Sunday, which would put her on track to become the oldest alpine skier to compete at the Olympics if she makes it to the start gate. blocks.text: Two Feb 3 signals are actionable: Lindsey Vonn now says she has a complete ACL rupture, which cuts U.S. downhill silver odds despite her intent to try; and Super Bowl coverage continues to give Seattle the cleaner quarterback/team edge while Drake Maye manages a shoulder issue.

input.command:
/usr/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import csv,json,os
from collections import Counter
print('state_exists', os.path.exists('state.json'))
if os.path.exists('state.json'):
    print(json.dumps(json.load(open('state.json')), indent=2)[:5000])
rows=list(csv.DictReader(open('market.csv', newline='')))
active=[r for r in rows if r['is_resolved'].lower()=='false']
resolved=[r for r in rows if r['is_resolved'].lower()=='true']
print('rows',len(rows),'active',len(active),'resolved',len(resolved))
print('active_without_prediction',sum(1 for r in active if not r['my_prediction'] or r['my_prediction']=='None'))
print('active_pred_dates',Counter(r['my_prediction_date'] for r in active).most_common(35))
print('\\nResolved on/after 2026-02-03:')
for r in resolved:
    if r['resolution_date']>='2026-02-03':
        print('\\nQ',r['qid'],'resdate',r['resolution_date'],'GT',r['ground_truth'])
        print('title:',r['title'])
        print('my:',r['my_prediction'],'date',r['my_prediction_date'])
print('\\nActive upcoming <=2026-02-14:')
for r in active:
    if r['resolution_date'] <= '2026-02-14':
        print('\\nQ',r['qid'],'resdate',r['resolution_date'])
        print('title:',r['title'])
        print('my:',r['my_prediction'],'date',r['my_prediction_date'])
PY"
